evals.expected_output: Full weekly review: discovers accounts with open opps, processes each via subagents, reports results, runs retro
expectations: Config read and vault/Salesforce CLI verified
All account directories scanned for salesforce_opportunity fields
Accounts categorized: active (set up), needs setup, bad opp URL
Bad opp URLs auto-fixed by querying Salesforce for open opps on the Account ID
Account URLs in salesforce_opportunity fields moved to salesforce_account
Subagents launched in parallel for all active accounts
Each subagent pulls deal context via Salesforce REST API
Closed opportunities detected and salesforce_opportunity fields cleared
Unsummarized meetings with transcripts/briefs auto-summarized via /ld-summarize-account
Weekly (status) ledger entry added or updated (only one per account)
Salesforce Updates section updated with status line at top of code block
SE status pushed to Salesforce via PATCH REST API for each open opportunity
Report table shows account, stage, amount, close date, forecast, status entry, SF push
Accounts needing setup listed with prompt to create them
Phase 4 retro: model performance logged, cross-account patterns discovered
Portfolio insights added to Pending Review with [portfolio] tag
Learnings surfaced in tomorrow's daily note if pending items exist

evals.expected_output: Detects closed opportunities, clears frontmatter fields, skips remaining steps for that account
expectations: Subagent queries Salesforce and finds IsClosed=true for all opportunities
salesforce_opportunity fields cleared in account frontmatter
Account reported as 'no_open_opps' status
Remaining steps (ledger, SF push) skipped for this account
Closed opportunity listed in Newly Closed Opportunities report section

evals.expected_output: Auto-summarizes meetings that have transcripts but no summary before continuing
expectations: Meeting files scanned for empty ## Summary sections
Meetings with External Summary or Transcript content identified as summarizable
/ld-summarize-account run for the account before adding ledger entry
Account file and Ledger.md re-read after summarization
Report shows which accounts were auto-summarized and how many meetings

evals.expected_output: Only one (status) entry exists per account in the ledger
expectations: Existing (status) entry in ledger found and replaced (not duplicated)
New (status) entry placed at top of ledger if none existed
Status entry format: '- M/D INITIALS (status): concise update'
Status entry is max ~20 words, includes stage and what's next
No deal amounts, close dates, or forecast in status entry
